practice.name: Smile Dental Care
practice.address: 9550 Dix Ave Suite D, Dearborn, MI 48120

highlights.title: Call before you visit
highlights.body: Confirm current hours, appointment availability, and what to bring before you come in.

highlights.title: Ask about your next step
highlights.body: Share what is bothering you or what you want to improve, and the team can help route your visit.

highlights.title: Bring your questions
highlights.body: Use your appointment to talk through care options, timing, comfort, and follow-up needs.

highlights.title: Plan around your schedule
highlights.body: Call the office for current scheduling details, directions, and visit preparation.

homepage.heroHeadline: Your family deserves a healthier, brighter smile.
homepage.heroBody: Gentle, professional dental care for patients of all ages, right here on Dix Avenue in Dearborn.

services.title: Preventive Visits
services.summary: Call to ask about routine visits, exams, and care that helps you stay on track.
services.imageAlt: Smile Dental Care team inside the Dearborn clinic

services.title: Tooth Repair Questions
services.summary: Ask the team what options may fit a chipped, sensitive, or uncomfortable tooth.
services.imageAlt: Dr. Bassam Ali at Smile Dental Care

services.title: Smile Goals
services.summary: Talk with the office about appearance-focused questions and available next steps.
services.imageAlt: Smile Dental Care team outside the clinic building

services.title: Family Dental Visits
services.summary: Ask about scheduling visits for different members of your household.
services.imageAlt: Smile Dental Care team standing outside the clinic

services.title: Consultations
services.summary: Share your questions and get help choosing the right appointment type.
services.imageAlt: Smile Dental Care team inside the clinic

services.title: Ongoing Care
services.summary: Call to plan follow-up timing and understand what to do after your visit.
services.imageAlt: Smile Dental Care clinic exterior with the team

careFeatures.title: Clear explanations. Calm visits.
careFeatures.body: We take time to listen, answer your questions, and explain every step so you feel comfortable from the moment you arrive.
careFeatures.imageAlt: Smile Dental Care team inside the Dearborn clinic

careFeatures.title: One team for your whole family.
careFeatures.body: From first visits to long-term care, our Dix Avenue team is here to make dental care simple, welcoming, and reliable.
careFeatures.imageAlt: Smile Dental Care team outside the clinic building

benefits.title: A clear first call
benefits.body: Reach the office directly to ask about appointments, directions, and visit preparation.

benefits.title: Clear explanations
benefits.body: We explain your options in plain language so you can make confident decisions.

benefits.title: Comfort-minded visits
benefits.body: Tell us what you need and what concerns you, so your visit can be planned thoughtfully.

benefits.title: Easy to get started
benefits.body: Call us to ask a question, confirm current availability, or schedule your visit.

services.title: Ask about the care your smile needs.
services.body: Because treatment availability can change, call our team to confirm the right appointment type for you.

whyUs.title: Dentistry built on trust and care.

reviews.title: A clearer visit from the first call.
reviews.body: Start with a quick call to confirm current hours, scheduling, directions, and the best next step for your smile.

team.title: Care from people you can trust.
team.body: Led by Dr. Bassam Ali, our Dearborn team is known for being kind, clear, and thorough.

teamStory.title: One team. One warm welcome.
teamStory.body: From the front desk to the treatment room, we make every visit clear, comfortable, and cared for.

cta.title: Your healthier smile starts with a call.
cta.body: Have a question or ready to schedule? Our Dearborn team is here to help.

visit.title: Convenient care on Dix Avenue.
visit.body: Located at 9550 Dix Ave Suite D. Call for directions, hours, or to schedule your appointment.
